'''âd-sh-zh-sh''' ('''kadashzheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:expertize|expertize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:expertize|expertize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-sh-zh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadashzheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidashzheshoko|thidashzheshoko]] || [[word:jidashzheshoko|jidashzheshoko]] || [[word:shidashzheshoko|shidashzheshoko]] || [[word:kidashzheshoko|kidashzheshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadashzheshithi|shadashzheshithi]] || [[word:shadashzheshiji|shadashzheshiji]] || [[word:shadashzheshishi|shadashzheshishi]] || [[word:shadashzheshiki|shadashzheshiki]]
